channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: UAB's Yaxel Lendeborg is going to Michigan if he doesn't stay in NBA draft, multiple outlets report
item.description: Yaxel Lendeborg has announced he'll transfer from UAB to Michigan and also go through the NBA draft evaluation process. Lendeborg's decision, reported by multiple media outlets Saturday, including ESPN, takes one of the top big men out of the transfer portal.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Carla Bernat Escuder leans on her Spanish roots to win Augusta National Women's Amateur
item.description: AUGUSTA, Ga. (AP) — Carla Bernat Escuder wasn't worried about anyone behind her, only those who were ahead. Thanks to a flop shot she only recently mastered, birdies on all the par 5s and a nervy 4-foot par putt to finish, the Spaniard stood alone at the Augusta National Women's Amateur.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FERGUSON, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Shohei Ohtani throws second bullpen since resuming mound ramp up
item.description: PHILADELPHIA (AP) — Shohei Ohtani threw a 26-pitch bullpen session Saturday before the Los Angeles Dodgers’ game against the Philadelphia Phillies, another step toward his mound return. Recovering from right elbow surgery on Sept.
item.dc:creator: ANTHONY SANFILIPPO, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Women's disc golfer refuses to face transgender competitor, days after fencer kneels in protest
item.description: Days after a women's fencer knelt to protest a trans opponent, a female disc golfer followed suit refusing to compete at an event that included a trans athlete.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Former Steelers player Ray Seals, who made it to the NFL despite skipping college, dead at 59
item.description: After a semipro football stint, Ray Seals signed with the Buccaneers in 1988. He earned a starting role by 1991, a position he held for three seasons.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Cleveland's José Ramírez hits 3 homers and claims another piece of Guardians history
item.description: ANAHEIM, Calif. (AP) — José Ramírez hit three homers and carried the Guardians to a victory Friday night. The slugger claimed another place in Cleveland baseball history in the process.
item.dc:creator: GREG BEACHAM, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Wayne Gretzky has been helping Alex Ovechkin long before this record goal chase
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — A little more than three decades before Alex Ovechkin's pursuit of Wayne Gretzky's NHL career goals record, the “Great One” had his own chase. Gretzky was in hot pursuit of Gordie Howe's record in the spring of 1994. Howe was there when Gretzky tied and passed him.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN WHYNO, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Real Salt Lake hosts winless champs LA Galaxy in crucial western showdown
item.description: Real Salt Lake (2-4-0, T-11th place Western Conference) returns home Saturday afternoon when they host reigning MLS Cup Champions LA Galaxy at America First Field. RSL is coming off a road loss on Saturday night and hope to get their season back on track against a struggling LA side.
item.dc:creator: Mattey Casey, ABC 4

item.title: Doug Bruno 'feels great,' but says stepping aside is the right call as Jill Pizzotti takes over at DePaul
item.description: CHICAGO – Less than a week after Hall of Fame head coach Doug Bruno stepped down for health reasons, the DePaul women’s basketball program named his successor—and it’s a familiar name to fans.
item.dc:creator: Josh Frydman, WGN 9

item.title: Report: Chris Collins agrees to multi-year extension with Northwestern
item.description: Northwestern University men's basketball coach Chris Collins has agreed to a multi-year contract extension, making him one of the top coaches in the Big Ten in terms of salary and compensation.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: How Mesa Juniors Volleyball Club brought home Gold in Las Vegas
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX) — Once high school volleyball season ends, several local high school athletes from all across the Western Slope come together to compete at the club level for the Mesa Juniors Volleyball Club.
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5

item.title: A's routed by Cubs 18-3 in Sacramento home opener
item.description: WEST SACRAMENTO, Calif. (AP) -- Carson Kelly hit for the cycle and drove in five runs, Michael Busch launched a two-run homer on the way to a career-high four RBIs, and the Chicago Cubs pounded the Athletics 18-3 on Monday night to spoil their first game in their new Northern California home.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Duke and Florida move on to Final Four
item.description: Florida and Duke won their regions on Saturday, with fellow top seeds Houston and Auburn set to play on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WFLA, NBC
